en_title: 'There's Real Nostalgia There' — Riot Has Unveiled League of Legends Classic, but Don't Expect a One-to-One Recreation of the Old Times
cn_title: 《英雄联盟》经典服官宣，但并非完全复刻旧版
subtitle: 回到早期召唤师峡谷
opus_summary: 拳头游戏公布《英雄联盟》经典服，以原始召唤师峡谷、60名英雄及旧版系统重现早期体验，同时加入现代匹配与性能优化。经典服将于7月29日上线，未来内容由社区投票影响。

paragraphs.en: Riot Games has unveiled League of Legends Classic, a new version of its phenomenally successful MOBA designed to tap into nostalgia for the game as it was over 15 years ago.
paragraphs.cn: 拳头游戏公布了《英雄联盟》经典服，这是其现象级成功MOBA的新版本，旨在唤起玩家对15年多前游戏面貌的怀念。

paragraphs.en: Classic is the biggest change to League of Legends in more than a decade, with gameplay that recreates the feel of the MOBA’s early days, while modernizing select systems for today’s players. Over the years, League of Legends has evolved into a substantially more complex game, with more diverse champion fantasies, skill expression, and mobility, Riot said. In League Classic, combat pacing is more similar to how it was in the past and champions have sharper strengths and weaknesses, encouraging more strategic decision making.
paragraphs.cn: 经典服是《英雄联盟》十多年来规模最大的变化：玩法重现这款MOBA早期的感觉，同时为当代玩家将部分系统现代化。拳头游戏表示，多年来《英雄联盟》已演变成复杂得多的游戏，英雄幻想、技术表现和机动性都更加多样。在经典服中，战斗节奏更接近过去，英雄的优势与弱点也更鲜明，从而鼓励玩家作出更具策略性的决策。

paragraphs.en: The idea is to deliver a “greatest hits” feel from across League’s early years, rather than a singular moment in time, Riot explained. Classic will feature the original Summoner’s Rift map, a starting roster of 60 champions, old-school items, runes, masteries, and mechanics. The developer will add additional champions over time, but Classic won’t include every champion released up to the present day. The League Classic map features targeted improvements to lighting, textures, and shadows, to heighten gameplay clarity.
paragraphs.cn: 拳头游戏解释称，目标是呈现《英雄联盟》早期岁月的「精选集」体验，而不是复刻某一个特定时间点。经典服将采用原始召唤师峡谷地图，首发提供60名英雄，并带回旧版装备、符文、天赋和机制。开发团队会逐步加入更多英雄，但经典服不会收录截至目前发布的全部英雄。经典服地图还会针对光照、纹理和阴影作出改进，以提升玩法清晰度。

paragraphs.en: You’ll unlock Runes and Masteries by playing Classic, though progression will be much faster than it was in the past and everyone will have access to default pages from the start. Classic also includes modern improvements like matchmaking updates, server infrastructure, performance improvements, modern pings, spell buffering, and optional WASD controls.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家可通过游玩经典服解锁符文和天赋，不过成长速度会比过去快得多，而且所有人一开始就能使用默认页面。经典服还包含匹配更新、服务器基础设施、性能提升、现代信号系统、技能指令缓冲，以及可选WASD操作等现代化改进。

paragraphs.en: Expect Riot to issue regular balance updates, but Classic will have its own balance philosophy focused on preserving what makes it unique, the developer said. Meanwhile, Riot has added The Council, a community voting system that will help guide the future of Classic.
paragraphs.cn: 开发团队表示，拳头游戏会定期推出平衡更新，但经典服拥有独立的平衡理念，重点是保留其独特之处。与此同时，拳头游戏加入了「议会」社区投票系统，帮助决定经典服的未来方向。

paragraphs.en: League of Legends Classic starts on Season 3 with a single PvP draft queue, Co-op vs AI, and customs, Riot confirmed. The Council will allow the community to vote on future choices such as Champion additions, skins made for Classic, and even gameplay changes, with Classic Level granting you a stronger voice, rewarding the most committed players.
paragraphs.cn: 拳头游戏确认，《英雄联盟》经典服将从第三赛季开始，提供单一PvP征召队列、人机合作模式和自定义游戏。「议会」允许社区投票决定未来选择，例如新增英雄、为经典服制作皮肤，甚至改变玩法；经典服等级越高，投票影响力越强，以此奖励投入最多的玩家。

paragraphs.en: Executive producer Paul Bellezza said: “League Classic is personal for us. You've been asking for this for years, and honestly, a lot of us at Riot have missed that early League feeling too. There's real nostalgia there. We're not going for a one-to-one recreation of the old times. We want League Classic to scratch that itch while still bringing something new to the table. At its core, this is about honoring League's roots. Whether you've been here since the beginning or you're coming back after years away, we want this to feel like home.”
paragraphs.cn: 执行制作人Paul Bellezza表示：「《英雄联盟》经典服对我们而言很私人。你们多年来一直提出这个要求，老实说，拳头游戏内部许多人也很怀念《英雄联盟》早期的感觉。那里确实有真正的怀旧情绪。我们并不打算一比一重现过去，而是希望经典服既能满足这种渴望，又带来一些新东西。归根结底，这是为了致敬《英雄联盟》的根源。无论你从一开始就在这里，还是离开多年后回归，我们都希望它能让你有回家的感觉。」

paragraphs.en: Classic launches on July 29 alongside Patch 26.15. Here’s all the information you need to know, direct from Riot:
paragraphs.cn: 经典服将于7月29日随26.15版本一同上线。以下是拳头游戏直接公布的全部须知信息：

paragraphs.en: League Classic features Seasonal Classic Passes, similar to Battle Passes in that they have a free and paid track, granting various rewards including IP, BE, Rune Pages, emotes, titles, and Classic Skins and Portraits.
paragraphs.cn: 《英雄联盟》经典服提供经典赛季通行证，与战斗通行证类似，分为免费和付费路线，可获得IP、BE、符文页、表情、称号、经典皮肤及头像等各种奖励。

paragraphs.en: Classic Skins are skins that bring back the iconic look of Classic champions as they sported during the 2009-2013 era.
paragraphs.cn: 经典皮肤会还原经典英雄在2009年至2013年期间使用的标志性外观。
